详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "1. ‌Nutritional supplementation and protein optimization‌ Oat protein contains 8 essential amino acids (lysine being particularly prominent), with high biological utilization rate, making it suitable for vegetarians to supplement protein‌ Nuts provide high-quality fats (such as unsaturated fatty acids) and vitamin E, which, when combined with oat protein, enhance nutritional density‌ 2. ‌Regulating blood sugar and blood lipids‌ The β-glucan in oats delays gastric emptying and reduces post-meal blood sugar fluctuations; the fat in nuts can lower the glycemic index of food‌ The combination of the two reduces cholesterol absorption and assists in lowering low-density lipoprotein (LDL) levels‌ 3. ‌Cardiovascular and intestinal health‌ The oat saponins and the unsaturated fats in nuts jointly reduce the risk of atherosclerosis‌ High dietary fiber (oat β-glucan + nut fiber) promotes intestinal peristalsis, improves constipation and maintains the balance of the intestinal flora 4. ‌Antioxidation and metabolic support‌ The oat polyphenols (such as ferulic acid) and the vitamin E in nuts work together to eliminate free radicals and alleviate oxidative stress The B vitamins (such as thiamine, niacin, etc.) are involved in energy metabolism and help relieve fatigue.1. ‌营养补充与蛋白质优化‌ 燕麦蛋白含8种必需氨基酸（赖氨酸尤为突出），生物利用率高，适合素食者补充蛋白质‌ 坚果提供优质脂肪（如不饱和脂肪酸）和维生素E，与燕麦蛋白协同增强营养密度‌ 2. ‌调节血糖与血脂‌ 燕麦中的β-葡聚糖延缓胃排空，降低餐后血糖波动；坚果脂肪可降低食物升糖指数‌ 两者结合减少胆固醇吸收，辅助降低低密度脂蛋白（LDL）水平‌ 3. ‌心血管与肠道健康‌ 燕麦皂甙和坚果不饱和脂肪酸共同减少动脉粥样硬化风险‌ 高膳食纤维（燕麦β-葡聚糖+坚果纤维）促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘及菌群平衡 4. ‌抗氧化与代谢支持‌ 燕麦多酚（如阿魏酸）与坚果维生素E协同清除自由基，减轻氧化应激‌ B族维生素（硫胺素、烟酸等）参与能量代谢，缓解疲劳‌"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/8f4e5785efb20564b034f1ed0d71f1fb.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/8397e870c90148b7138e56a891ae2504.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/3a9c02f56d161c962cf0bee571266665.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/087a9a33677c475e9a69dbdf840ba1fd.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/ce5a7251d95ff13a1f97dab7356c4345.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/c627d112fa47d96999943eef9b5bb134.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/8d0afeba8ca8af76addc09884ce2fe8a.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/adcd9432c17206981dfe7bcc01a7690e.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/404bdd8a983890481f0b218402f938a4.jpg"}]

1. ‌Nutritional supplementation and protein optimization‌

Oat protein contains 8 essential amino acids (lysine being particularly prominent), with high biological utilization rate, making it suitable for vegetarians to supplement protein‌

Nuts provide high-quality fats (such as unsaturated fatty acids) and vitamin E, which, when combined with oat protein, enhance nutritional density‌

2. ‌Regulating blood sugar and blood lipids‌

The β-glucan in oats delays gastric emptying and reduces post-meal blood sugar fluctuations; the fat in nuts can lower the glycemic index of food‌

The combination of the two reduces cholesterol absorption and assists in lowering low-density lipoprotein (LDL) levels‌

3. ‌Cardiovascular and intestinal health‌

The oat saponins and the unsaturated fats in nuts jointly reduce the risk of atherosclerosis‌

High dietary fiber (oat β-glucan + nut fiber) promotes intestinal peristalsis, improves constipation and maintains the balance of the intestinal flora

4. ‌Antioxidation and metabolic support‌

The oat polyphenols (such as ferulic acid) and the vitamin E in nuts work together to eliminate free radicals and alleviate oxidative stress The B vitamins (such as thiamine, niacin, etc.) are involved in energy metabolism and help relieve fatigue.1. ‌营养补充与蛋白质优化‌

燕麦蛋白含8种必需氨基酸（赖氨酸尤为突出），生物利用率高，适合素食者补充蛋白质‌

坚果提供优质脂肪（如不饱和脂肪酸）和维生素E，与燕麦蛋白协同增强营养密度‌

2. ‌调节血糖与血脂‌

燕麦中的β-葡聚糖延缓胃排空，降低餐后血糖波动；坚果脂肪可降低食物升糖指数‌

两者结合减少胆固醇吸收，辅助降低低密度脂蛋白（LDL）水平‌

3. ‌心血管与肠道健康‌

燕麦皂甙和坚果不饱和脂肪酸共同减少动脉粥样硬化风险‌

高膳食纤维（燕麦β-葡聚糖+坚果纤维）促进肠道蠕动，改善便秘及菌群平衡

4. ‌抗氧化与代谢支持‌

燕麦多酚（如阿魏酸）与坚果维生素E协同清除自由基，减轻氧化应激‌

B族维生素（硫胺素、烟酸等）参与能量代谢，缓解疲劳‌

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Warrior Crunch Protein Bars are designed as a practical, high-protein snack you can enjoy anytime Each bar contains a good amount of protein to help support muscle recovery, while remaining low in sugar. Ideal for after workouts, between meals, or when you need a quick snack during a busy day. Whether you’re training regularly or simply looking for a better snack option, Warrior Crunch offers a balance of nutrition and taste.

• High protein per bar

• Low sugar content

• Crunchy wafer texture with chocolate coating

• Suitable for gym, work, travel, and race days

• HALAL certified

[Olive Young] Rally Protein Bar Whey Protein Isolate 21g - 58g Chocolate Chunk/ Matcha Latte / Injeolmi / Cacao Caramel

Product Detail

Contents: 58 g (185 kcal)

Grab-and-go bar format, ideal for busy mornings, gym bags, or desk drawers

Packs 21g of clean protein in a compact size

Made without excessive sugar — uses sugar alcohols to keep it sweet but light

Soft, chewy, and nutty with the rich, roasted flavour of Korean injeolmi. Comforting and subtly sweet, it delivers a dessert-like bite with none of the guilt. Finished with a toasty soybean aroma and just the right amount of creaminess, it’s perfect for curbing cravings the wholesome way.

Crafted for modern lifestyles, their range of high-protein muesli and instant oats turns everyday eating into a mindful ritual. Whether you’re powering through your morning with Dark Chocolate Cranberry Muesli or diving into Banana Cream Oats between meetings, Yoga Bar delivers wholesome energy with a delicious twist. 详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Up to 20g of protein Triple-layer texture: soft protein core + creamy filling + chocolate coating No added sugar Made in Europe Enrich your day with the satisfying nutrition and indulgent triple layer texture of the IntiCo 36% Protein Bar. Each bar contains 36% protein, delivering around 20g of high-quality protein in a compact 55g serving. It helps you refuel quickly, support muscle recovery, and stay in top condition. The triple-layer structure offers a satisfying bite every time: a soft, dense protein center, a smooth creamy layer, and a rich chocolate outer coat. With zero added sugar and only about 200 kcal per bar, it’s light yet filling, providing lasting satiety without burden. Whether you're a fitness enthusiast, a busy professional, or someone pursuing a healthier lifestyle, the IntiCo 36% Protein Bar is your ideal daily companion, bringing energy, nutrition, and great taste all at once."}]

Enrich your day with the satisfying nutrition and indulgent triple layer texture of the IntiCo 36% Protein Bar.

Each bar contains 36% protein, delivering around 20g of high-quality protein in a compact 55g serving. It helps you refuel quickly, support muscle recovery, and stay in top condition. The triple-layer structure offers a satisfying bite every time: a soft, dense protein center, a smooth creamy layer, and a rich chocolate outer coat. With zero added sugar and only about 200 kcal per bar, it’s light yet filling, providing lasting satiety without burden.

Whether you're a fitness enthusiast, a busy professional, or someone pursuing a healthier lifestyle, the IntiCo 36% Protein Bar is your ideal daily companion, bringing energy, nutrition, and great taste all at once.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Small in size, big on satisfaction. POST Mini Energy/ Protein Bars are bite-sized snack bars made with nuts, grains, and chocolate — easy to enjoy anytime, anywhere. Each bar is individually portioned, making it perfect for a quick snack at work, between meals, or on the go. 3 Types: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ** Post Mini Protein Bar (White Pack) ** Nutty, chocolatey, and protein-boosted Made with roasted peanuts and almonds, this mini protein bar is packed with nutty crunch and wrapped in smooth chocolate. It uses soy protein to give a satisfying bite, with dried cranberries adding a light fruity balance to the richness. Not overly sweet, and easy to chew. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ** Post Mini Energy Bar Active (Red Pack)** Crunchy energy with a chocolate twist This bar combines roasted peanuts, almonds, pecans, and grain crunch with chocolate for a bold, satisfying bite. Texture-wise, it’s crunchy and hearty, with a strong nutty-chocolate flavour that keeps you going without feeling boring. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ** Post Mini Energy Bar Balance (Blue Pack)** Light, and crunchy A mix of roasted peanuts, almonds, oats, granola, and dried fruits like raisins and cranberries gives this bar a pleasant balance of crunch and chew. It’s gently sweet, with a lighter mouthfeel thanks to fibre ingredients and grains. Easy to enjoy anytime — not too heavy, not too sweet."}]

Small in size, big on satisfaction.

POST Mini Energy/ Protein Bars are bite-sized snack bars made with nuts, grains, and chocolate — easy to enjoy anytime, anywhere. Each bar is individually portioned, making it perfect for a quick snack at work, between meals, or on the go.

3 Types:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

** Post Mini Protein Bar (White Pack) **

Nutty, chocolatey, and protein-boosted

Made with roasted peanuts and almonds, this mini protein bar is packed with nutty crunch and wrapped in smooth chocolate.

It uses soy protein to give a satisfying bite, with dried cranberries adding a light fruity balance to the richness. Not overly sweet, and easy to chew.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

** Post Mini Energy Bar Active (Red Pack)**

Crunchy energy with a chocolate twist

This bar combines roasted peanuts, almonds, pecans, and grain crunch with chocolate for a bold, satisfying bite. Texture-wise, it’s crunchy and hearty, with a strong nutty-chocolate flavour that keeps you going without feeling boring.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

** Post Mini Energy Bar Balance (Blue Pack)**

Light, and crunchy

A mix of roasted peanuts, almonds, oats, granola, and dried fruits like raisins and cranberries gives this bar a pleasant balance of crunch and chew. It’s gently sweet, with a lighter mouthfeel thanks to fibre ingredients and grains. Easy to enjoy anytime — not too heavy, not too sweet.

GHOST® Protein Bars deliver 20g of premium protein, only 2g of sugar, and 250 calories per serving in a ridiculously tasty dual-bar pack to support your daily protein goals, muscle recovery, and sweet cravings. Whether you're hitting intense training sessions, rushing through a demanding work schedule, needing an on-the-go snack between classes, or simply looking to satisfy your sweet tooth without the guilt, this layered and delicious formula helps you fuel up and perform at your best. ⭐ KEY BENEFITS • Supports muscle recovery and daily protein intake • Only 2g of sugar to help satisfy sweet cravings without the guilt • Convenient grab-and-go fuel for busy schedules and travel • Features a layered texture with a legendary, ridiculously tasty crunch • Supports overall daily fitness, performance, and energy goals 🔥 WHY CHOOSE GHOST® PROTEIN BARS? ✅ 20g Premium Protein Provides 20g of high-quality protein per dual-bar pack to help build and maintain muscle. ✅ Only 2g Sugar & 250 Calories A dessert-inspired flavor that satisfies your cravings with very low sugar and easy-to-track calories. ✅ 12 Dual-Bar Packs Perfectly portioned and individually wrapped for ultimate on-the-go convenience. 🌿 HIGHLIGHT FEATURE Ridiculously Tasty Dual-Bar Format GHOST® Protein Bars are designed to be layered, ridiculously tasty, and packed with a legendary crunch. This convenient dual-bar format allows you to enjoy your protein snack anytime, chocolatey bite by chocolatey bite, without the boring taste of traditional protein bars. ✔ 20g Premium Protein Per Pack ✔ Only 2g Sugar ✔ Legendary Crunch & Layered Texture ✔ Convenient Grab-N-Go Format 📌 HOW TO USE Suggested Use: Enjoy 1 pack (2 bars) daily as a high-protein snack between meals, pre/post-workout, or whenever you need on-the-go fuel. ⚠ WARNING • Contains milk and soy ingredients. Manufactured in a facility that may process wheat, peanuts, tree nuts, and eggs. • For adult use as a food snack / dietary supplement. • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. #GHOST #ProteinBar #ChocoChipCookie Dough #GrabAndGoGains #HighProtein #GymSnack #OnTheGoFuel #MuscleRecovery #LowSugar #FitnessNutrition #UltimateSup"}]

🍪 GHOST® Protein Bars Choco Chip Cookie Dough (12-Pack)

Grab-N-Go Gains. Dessert-Like Taste. Daily Protein.

GHOST® Protein Bars deliver 20g of premium protein, only 2g of sugar, and 250 calories per serving in a ridiculously tasty dual-bar pack to support your daily protein goals, muscle recovery, and sweet cravings.

Whether you're hitting intense training sessions, rushing through a demanding work schedule, needing an on-the-go snack between classes, or simply looking to satisfy your sweet tooth without the guilt, this layered and delicious formula helps you fuel up and perform at your best.

⭐ KEY BENEFITS



• Supports muscle recovery and daily protein intake



• Only 2g of sugar to help satisfy sweet cravings without the guilt



• Convenient grab-and-go fuel for busy schedules and travel



• Features a layered texture with a legendary, ridiculously tasty crunch



• Supports overall daily fitness, performance, and energy goals

🔥 WHY CHOOSE GHOST® PROTEIN BARS?

✅ 20g Premium Protein



Provides 20g of high-quality protein per dual-bar pack to help build and maintain muscle.

✅ Only 2g Sugar & 250 Calories



A dessert-inspired flavor that satisfies your cravings with very low sugar and easy-to-track calories.

✅ 12 Dual-Bar Packs



Perfectly portioned and individually wrapped for ultimate on-the-go convenience.

🌿 HIGHLIGHT FEATURE

Ridiculously Tasty Dual-Bar Format

GHOST® Protein Bars are designed to be layered, ridiculously tasty, and packed with a legendary crunch. This convenient dual-bar format allows you to enjoy your protein snack anytime, chocolatey bite by chocolatey bite, without the boring taste of traditional protein bars.

✔ 20g Premium Protein Per Pack



✔ Only 2g Sugar



✔ Legendary Crunch & Layered Texture



✔ Convenient Grab-N-Go Format

📌 HOW TO USE

Suggested Use:



Enjoy 1 pack (2 bars) daily as a high-protein snack between meals, pre/post-workout, or whenever you need on-the-go fuel.

⚠ WARNING

• Contains milk and soy ingredients. Manufactured in a facility that may process wheat, peanuts, tree nuts, and eggs.



• For adult use as a food snack / dietary supplement.



• Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
